user_query: Would Dave prefer working on a Dodge Charger or a Subaru Forester?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Dave")]/Session[atom(content =~ "Dodge Charger Subaru Forester preference")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "prefer working Dodge Charger") or atom(content =~ "prefer working Subaru Forester")])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Dave")]/Session[atom(content =~ "Dodge Charger Subaru Forester preference")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "prefer working Dodge Charger") or atom(content =~ "prefer working Subaru Forester")]
canonical_full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[content =~ "Dave"]/Session[content =~ "Dodge Charger Subaru Forester preference"]/max(Observation[content =~ "prefer working Dodge Charger"], Observation[content =~ "prefer working Subaru Forester"]))
canonical_xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[content =~ "Dave"]/Session[content =~ "Dodge Charger Subaru Forester preference"]/max(Observation[content =~ "prefer working Dodge Charger"], Observation[content =~ "prefer working Subaru Forester"])
